allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total tasks: {len\(d[""tasks""]\)}''''\); print\(\); [print\(f''''  [{t[""status""]}] {t[""title""]} \(domain={t[""domain""]}, project={t.get\(""project"",""n/a""\)}\)''''\) for t in d[''''tasks'''']]")
Bash(xcodebuild -project ForgetMeNot.xcodeproj -scheme ForgetMeNot -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -sdk iphonesimulator build)
